lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੁ ਨ ਚੀਨਸਿ ਭ੍ਰਮਿ ਭ੍ਰਮਿ ਰੋਵੈ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: aap na cheenas bhram bhram rovai |6|
lines.english: He does not know his own self, and trapped by doubts, he cries out in pain. ||6||
He wastes this precious human life through duality.
Speak, read and hear of the One Lord.
The Support of the earth shall bless you with courage, righteousness and protection.
Chastity, purity and self-restraint are infused into the heart,

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਉਥੇ ਪਦ ਕਉ ਜੇ ਮਨੁ ਪਤੀਆਏ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: chauthe pad kau je man pateeae |7|
lines.english: when one centers his mind in the fourth state. ||7||
They are immaculate and true, and filth does not stick to them.
Nanak begs for the Lord, the Embodiment of Truth. ||8||1||
The form and personality of the Primal Lord are incomparably beautiful.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਭਰਮ ਭਉ ਭਾਗੈ ॥
lines.translit: gur kai sabad bharam bhau bhaagai |
lines.english: Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, their doubt and fear depart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾ ਤਿਸੁ ਮਰਣੁ ਨ ਆਵਣੁ ਜਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: naa tis maran na aavan jaan |
lines.english: Thereafter, one does not die, and does not come and go in reincarnation.
Dhanaasaree, First Mehl:
That union with the Lord is acceptable, which is united in intuitive poise.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਹ ਦੇਖਾ ਤਹ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਕੋਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jeh dekhaa teh avar na koe |1|
lines.english: Wherever I look, I see none other than the Lord. ||1||
The Gurmukhs worship the Lord, and find His celestial home.

lines.gurmukhi: ਠਾਕੁਰ ਮਹਿ ਦਾਸੁ ਦਾਸ ਮਹਿ ਸੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: tthaakur meh daas daas meh soe |
lines.english: The Lord's slave is in the Lord, and the Lord is in His slave.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਗੁਰੁ ਕਰਉ ਜਿ ਸਾਚੁ ਦ੍ਰਿੜਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: so gur krau ji saach drirraavai |
lines.english: So make Him your Guru, who implants the Truth within you,

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਗੁਰ ਭੇਟੇ ਮਰਿ ਆਈਐ ਜਾਈਐ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: bin gur bhette mar aaeeai jaaeeai |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Without meeting the Guru, they die, and come and go in reincarnation. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕੇ ਲੋਗ ਅਵਰ ਨਹੀ ਕਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: har ke log avar nahee kaaraa |
lines.english: God's people have no other work to do;
they love the True Lord and Master, and they love the Truth. ||2||
who leads you to speak the Unspoken Speech, and who merges you in the Word of the Shabad.
Merging into the True Lord, one is absorbed into Truth.
God's servant bows at His feet.
Meeting the True Guru, one meets with the Lord. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਨ ਮਹਿ ਮਨੂਆ ਮਨ ਮਹਿ ਸਾਚਾ ॥
lines.translit: tan meh manooaa man meh saachaa |
lines.english: The mind is in the body, and the True Lord is in the mind.
He Himself watches over us, and He Himself makes us see.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਠਿ ਨ ਪਤੀਜੈ ਨਾ ਬਹੁ ਭੇਖੈ ॥
lines.translit: hatth na pateejai naa bahu bhekhai |
lines.english: He is not pleased by stubborn-mindedness, nor by various religious robes.
He fashioned the body-vessels, and infused the Ambrosial Nectar into them;
God's Mind is pleased only by loving devotional worship. ||4||
By great cleverness, one is consigned to coming and going in reincarnation.
Reading and studying, one becomes confused, and suffers punishment.
He worships stones, dwells at sacred shrines of pilgrimage and in the jungles,
becomes Gurmukh, the Lord's servant, and remains absorbed in the Lord. ||5||
One who chants the Naam, the Name of the Lord, and eats the food of the Fear of God
But his mind is still filthy - how can he become pure?
One who meets the True Lord obtains honor. ||6||
wanders, roams around and becomes a renunciate.
In the twinkling of an eye, he saves millions.
One who embodies good conduct and contemplative meditation,
his mind abides in intuitive poise and contentment, since the beginning of time, and throughout the ages.
Have mercy on me, O my Beloved, and let me meet the Guru. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਧੁ ਬਿਨੁ ਦੂਜਾ ਮੈ ਕੋ ਨਾਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: tudh bin doojaa mai ko naahee |
lines.english: Without You, there is no other at all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਤੁਧੁ ਭਾਵੈ ਤਿਉ ਰਾਖੁ ਰਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: jiau tudh bhaavai tiau raakh rajaae |
lines.english: As it pleases You, keep me under Your Will.
Unto whom, O God, should I praise You?
Nanak, with intuitive poise and natural love, sings Your Glorious Praises. ||8||2||
Dhanaasaree, Fifth Mehl, Sixth House, Ashtapadee:
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਜੋ ਜੂਨੀ ਆਇਓ ਤਿਹ ਤਿਹ ਉਰਝਾਇਓ ਮਾਣਸ ਜਨਮੁ ਸੰਜੋਗਿ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: jo jo joonee aaeo tih tih urajhaaeo maanas janam sanjog paaeaa |
lines.english: Whoever is born into the world, is entangled in it; human birth is obtained only by good destiny.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾ ਕੀ ਹੈ ਓਟ ਸਾਧ ਰਾਖਹੁ ਦੇ ਕਰਿ ਹਾਥ ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਮੇਲਹੁ ਹਰਿ ਰਾਇਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: taa kee hai ott saadh raakhahu de kar haath kar kirapaa melahu har raaeaa |1|
lines.english: I look to Your support, O Holy Saint; give me Your hand, and protect me. By Your Grace, let me meet the Lord, my King. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਉ ਸੇਵਾ ਗੁਰ ਲਾਗਉ ਚਰਨ ਗੋਵਿੰਦ ਜੀ ਕਾ ਮਾਰਗੁ ਦੇਹੁ ਜੀ ਬਤਾਈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: krau sevaa gur laagau charan govind jee kaa maarag dehu jee bataaee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: I serve the Guru, and I fall at His feet, praying, "O Dear Lord of the Universe, please, show me the way." ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਿਕ ਜਨਮ ਭ੍ਰਮਿ ਥਿਤਿ ਨਹੀ ਪਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: anik janam bhram thit nahee paaee |
lines.english: I wandered through countless incarnations, but I did not find stability anywhere.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਿਕ ਉਪਾਵ ਕਰਉ ਮਾਇਆ ਕਉ ਬਚਿਤਿ ਧਰਉ ਮੇਰੀ ਮੇਰੀ ਕਰਤ ਸਦ ਹੀ ਵਿਹਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: anik upaav krau maaeaa kau bachit dhrau meree meree karat sad hee vihaavai |
lines.english: I have tried so many things to acquire the wealth of Maya, and to cherish it in my mind; I have passed my life constantly crying out, "Mine, mine!"
